launch_inputs.source_document: Use the uploaded export API source material to extract a structured packet of endpoints, operator-visible statuses, retry semantics, documented gaps, and unresolved ambiguities.
launch_inputs.target_fields_or_schema: endpoints, job states, retry behavior, operator-facing status copy, known documentation gaps
launch_inputs.normalization_rules: Prefer concise normalized values and keep short evidence notes for any field that remains unclear or under-documented.
